text: Indrajit Mani was admitted to Apollo Hospital after experiencing abdominal pain. Past medical records show Type 2 diabetes. Clinical assessment: ECG showed normal sinus rhythm. Treatment plan includes allopurinol 100mg. Discharge scheduled after observation.

Ryan Devi was admitted to Max Healthcare after experiencing dizziness. Past medical records show sleep apnea. Clinical assessment: serum cholesterol was 210 mg/dL. Treatment plan includes  ferrous sulfate. Discharge scheduled after observation.
